Part.Source: Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAPRECO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &TabelaPrecoNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon108_CasasDecimais, &TConVlr) &QtdCasasDecimais = iif(&TConVlr.IsEmpty(),2, val(&TConVlr)) &PadRotLin = 'ATPRC' + trim(Str(&Context.EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) &AtualizarMarKup = true padraoUsuario.Call('L', '#ATUALIZARACRESCIMO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObsMark, &PadDtaMod) if &PadObsMark = '0' &AtualizarMarKup = false endif do 'GetFilial' do 'GetPedido' &IsSel.Enabled = 1 AvisoMar.ForeColor = RGB(0,70,170) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PadRotLin.Visible = False &QtdCasasDecimais.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PrecosProduto.Title = 'Add R$' &ProdutosAfetados.Title = 'Afetados' EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &gridProGraRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PadRotLin = 'ATPRC' + trim(Str(&EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PadDtaMod) &sdtAtualizaPreco.FromJson(&PadObs) EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load RetornaProdutosAfetadosCusto.call(EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &IsProdutosAfetados) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ActionSelecione1.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione1.TooltipText = "Selecionar para Alterar" &ProdutosAfetados = !'' &PrecosProduto = !'' &gridProGraRef= ProGraRef &gridProNomGra = ProNomGra &PedQtd = retiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Udp(trim(toformattedString(PedQtd))) &gridProIMC = ProIMC &gridProGraRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &gridProNomGra.Link = Produtos.Link('', TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, ProCod, '') &gridProNomGra.LinkTarget = '_blank' if &UmConCod <> 0 RetornaValorConcorrente.Call(&EmpCod, &UmConCod, ProCod, &UmConProVlr) EndiF If &DoisConCod <> 0 RetornaValorConcorrente.Call(&EmpCod, &DoisConCod, ProCod, &DoisConProVlr) EndIF &EstMin = EstMin &UmConProVlr.ForeColor = RGB(200,130,0) &DoisConProVlr.ForeColor = RGB(200,130,0) &vlrPln1TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) &vlrPln2TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) &vlrPln3TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) &vlrPln4TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) If not &Pln1TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln1TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln1TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln1TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) EndIF If not &Pln2TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln2TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln2TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln2TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) Else &vlrPln2TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If not &Pln3TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln3TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln3TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln3TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) Else &vlrPln3TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If not &Pln4TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln4TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln4TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln4TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) Else &vlrPln4TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF RetornaValorTab_precificacao.call(EmpCod, &FilTabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &TabPrc1, &VarcharVencimento) &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod do 'getPrecoSelecaoSDT' &ProdutosAfetados.Visible = &IsProdutosAfetados //SUGESTAO //Preco Sugestao &ProNovPrc = 0 &ProVlrCus = ProVlrCus if PedVlrCus > 0 do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrCus > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrCus / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus EndCase Else do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrUntDsc > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrUntDsc / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc EndCase EndIF IF &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 and ProIMC <> 0 &ProNovPrc = round((&PedVlrUntComDsc * ( 1 + (ProIMC/100))), &QtdCasasDecimais) EndIF &ProNovPrc.Tooltiptext = '[Nv.Custo] * (1 + ([%Acrs.]/100))' &TabPrc1.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) if &TabPrc1 < &ProNovPrc &TabPrc1.ForeColor = RGB(250,0,0) EndIF &ProNovPrc.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) //Lucro Sugestao &LucroCalc = &ProNovPrc - (&PedVlrUntComDsc + &ProImcVlrTotDsp) &LucroCalc.Tooltiptext = 'Lucro: '+trim(ProImcMarLuc.ToFormattedString()) + '% da [Sug.]' &LucroCalc.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,250) if &NovoPreco <= 0 &NovoPreco= &ProNovPrc EndIF //NOVO PRECO &NovoLucro = round(&NovoPreco - (&PedVlrUntComDsc ),2) &NovoLucro.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,250) &NovoAcre= 0 if &NovoPreco > 0 and &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 &NovoAcre = round(100 - ((&NovoPreco / &PedVlrUntComDsc) * 100), 2) EndIF if &NovoAcre < 0 &NovoAcre = &NovoAcre * -1 EndIF &ActionSelecione1.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) if &IsSel = true &ActionSelecione1.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif &NovoPreco.Enabled = &IsSel EndEvent Event Enter if &AtualizarMarKup.ToString() <> &PadObsMark &PadObsMark = trim(&AtualizarMarKup.ToString()) padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#ATUALIZARACRESCIMO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObsMark, &PadDtaMod) EndIf padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PadDtaMod) &sdtAtualizaPreco.FromJson(&PadObs) For &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.IsSel = true &AuxTabPrc1 = &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 If &SdtColunasTabela.TabIsPerCol1 = true if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol2 <> 0 &TabPrc2 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol2/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc2 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol3 <> 0 &TabPrc3 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol3/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc3 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol4 <> 0 &TabPrc4 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol4/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc4 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol5 <> 0 &TabPrc5 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol5/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc5 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol6 <> 0 &TabPrc6 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol6/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc6 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol7 <> 0 &TabPrc7 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol7/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc7 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol8 <> 0 &TabPrc8 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol8/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc8 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol9 <> 0 &TabPrc9 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol9/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc9 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF Else if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol2 <> 0 &TabPrc2 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol2/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc2 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol3 <> 0 &TabPrc3 = round(&TabPrc2 + (&TabPrc2 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol3/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc3 = &TabPrc2 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol4 <> 0 &TabPrc4 = round(&TabPrc3 + (&TabPrc3 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol4/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc4 = &TabPrc3 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol5 <> 0 &TabPrc5 = round(&TabPrc4 + (&TabPrc4 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol5/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc5 = &TabPrc4 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol6 <> 0 &TabPrc6 = round(&TabPrc5 + (&TabPrc5 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol6/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc6 = &TabPrc5 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol7 <> 0 &TabPrc7 = round(&TabPrc6 + (&TabPrc6 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol7/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc7 = &TabPrc6 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol8 <> 0 &TabPrc8 = round(&TabPrc7 + (&TabPrc7 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol8/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc8 = &TabPrc7 EndIF if &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol9 <> 0 &TabPrc9 = round(&TabPrc8 + (&TabPrc8 * &SdtColunasTabela.tabperCol9/100),&QtdCasasDecimais) Else &TabPrc9 = &TabPrc8 EndIF EndIF &TabProDtaIni.SetEmpty() &TabProDtaFin.SetEmpty() GravaProdutoNaTabela.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &FilTabCod, &SdtColunasTabela.TabUltAlt, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod, 'ADD', &TabProDtaIni, &TabProDtaFin, &AuxTabPrc1, &TabPrc2, &TabPrc3, &TabPrc4, &TabPrc5,&TabPrc6,&TabPrc7,&TabPrc8,&TabPrc9, &Context.UserName) if &SdtColunasTabela.TabIsAntAcr = true GravaProdutoNaTabela_Vencimento.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &FilTabCod, &SdtColunasTabela.TabUltAlt, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod, &NovTabDtaVct, &Context.UserName) Endif if &AtualizarMarKup = true &novaMargem = 0 if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus > 0 &novaMargem = &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus Endif Do Case Case &novaMargem < 0 &novaMargem = 0 Case &novaMargem > 1000 &novaMargem = 999.99 EndCase if &novaMargem > 0 GravaAcrescimoVenda.call(&Context.EmpCod, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod, &novaMargem) Endif Endif EndIF EndFor padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wwPlanilhaCustoAcres.Link(&PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoDoVoltarPDV' wwPedidoCompra.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' For Each Line in grid &IsSel = true &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &sdtProVlrCus = &NovoAcre do 'SalvaSelecao' EndFor Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoDesMarcar' padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wwPlanilhaCustoAcres.Link(&PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTrocarTabela' wpProdutosTabela.Popup() wwPlanilhaCustoAcres.Link(&PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?9ed83ca2-b842-4444-bd88-5ef0c1226e33' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'LoadGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROREF" &ProRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIF EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROREF", "", not &ProRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIF EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &AtualizarMarKup.Click if &AtualizarMarKup.ToString() <> &PadObsMark &PadObsMark = trim(&AtualizarMarKup.ToString()) padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#ATUALIZARACRESCIMO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObsMark, &PadDtaMod) EndIf EndEvent Event ProIMC.Click wpAlterarAcrescimo.Popup(EmpCod, ProCod, &PedVlrUntComDsc) Refresh keep EndEvent Event &NovoPreco.IsValid if &NovoPreco <= 0 &NovoPreco = &ProNovPrc EndiF do 'CalculaDespesaLucroNovo' EndEvent Event &PrecosProduto.Click wpProdutosPrecosNovo.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod, ProCod, 0) Refresh EndEvent Event &ProdutosAfetados.Click wpProdutosAfetadosAumentoCusto.Popup(EmpCod, PedCod, FilCod, PedItmCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) EndEvent Event &NovTabDtaVct.IsValid &PadObs = &NovTabDtaVct.ToFormattedString() padraousuario.Call('G', '#VCTOPRECIFICACAO#', 1, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione1.Click if &IsSel = true &ActionSelecione1.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &IsSel = false Else &ActionSelecione1.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &IsSel = true Endif &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &sdtProVlrCus = &NovoAcre do 'SalvaSelecao' &NovoPreco.Enabled = &IsSel &NovoPreco.SetFocus() EndEvent Sub 'GetPedido' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod &AuxxPedCliCodRaz = Substr(PedCliCodRaz, 1, 30) &AuxxPedCod = PedCod if PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO &PedVlrUntComDsc.Visible =0 Endif Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GetFilial' For Each order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilTabCod = FilTabCod &vFilTabCod = &FilTabCod Exit EndFor //LOAD USADO EM VARIOS LUGARES. padraousuario.Call('L', '#TABELASSELECIONADAS#', 1, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) if not &PadObs.IsEmpty() &FilTabCod = trim(Substr(&PadObs, 1, 5)) &vFilTabCod = &FilTabCod Endif padraousuario.Call('L', '#VCTOPRECIFICACAO#', 1, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &NovTabDtaVct.FromString(&PadObs) if not &FilTabCod.IsEmpty() RetornaColunas_Nome.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &FilTabCod, &SdtColunasTabela) &VarcharVencimento.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela.TabIsAntAcr &TabIsAntAcr = &SdtColunasTabela.TabIsAntAcr Endif tbDadosAntecipacao.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela.TabIsAntAcr EndSub Sub 'getPrecoSelecaoSDT' &IsSel= false &NovoPreco = 0 For &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod and &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &NovoPreco = &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 &IsSel = &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.IsSel EndIF EndFor EndSub Sub 'SalvaSelecao' &isAChou = false for &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod and &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &isAChou = true &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.IsSel = &IsSel &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 = &NovoPreco &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus = &NovoAcre Exit EndIF EndFor if &isAChou = false &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem = new() &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.IsSel = &IsSel &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 = &NovoPreco &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus = &NovoAcre &sdtAtualizaPreco.Add(&sdtAtualizaPrecoItem) EndiF padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtAtualizaPreco.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) EndSub Sub 'CalculaDespesaLucroNovo' &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &sdtProVlrCus = &NovoAcre &NovoLucro = round(&NovoPreco - (&PedVlrUntComDsc),2) &NovoAcre= 0 if &NovoPreco > 0 and &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 &NovoAcre = round(100 - ((&NovoPreco / &PedVlrUntComDsc) * 100), 2) EndIF if &NovoAcre < 0 &NovoAcre = &NovoAcre * -1 EndIF do 'SalvaSelecao' EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
